body.title: D327 Phase 3: delete anthropic.py + merge base.py into gateway
body.result: anthropic.py deleted (D329). Ethics gate (core_patterns.py) rerouted through OR. MODEL_ALIASES moved to openrouter_reasoner.py. prefrontal_cortex.py fallback → OpenRouterReasoner. inference_gateway.py tier.5 nulled. base.py stays as shared ABC. 1875 tests pass.
body.description: Delete anthropic.py (D329 tier.5 dead). Move interactive routing from base.py into inference_gateway.py. Reduce base.py to BaseReasoner ABC or delete. Remove all tier.5 references. Tests must pass.
